CONTENT.Club career: Corbo made his Serie B debut for Spezia against Avellino on 11 May 2018.Corbo signed for Bologna from Spezia in the summer of 2018 in a reported €2.2 million deal.On 19 September 2020 he went to Ascoli on loan.On 5 December 2021, it was announced Corbo would join MLS side CF Montréal on loan for their 2022 season. On 20 March 2023, Corbo returned to Montréal on a permanent basis on a two-year contract, with an option for the third year.
CONTENT.Personal life: Corbo is a native of Naples.
CONTENT.International career: Corbo has represented Italy at U17, U18 and U20 level.

SUMMARY: Gabriele Corbo (born 11 January 2000) is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a defender for Major League Soccer club CF Montréal.
